description: Fix the Wikipedia API layer to check for MediaWiki error responses returned with HTTP 200 status.
qualityChecks: cd plugins/wikipedia && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Check for MediaWiki error field in API responses
userStories.description: The MediaWiki API returns errors as `{ error: { code, info } }` with HTTP 200. The api() function does not check for this, so errors are silently passed as data.
acceptanceCriteria: The api() function checks for an error field in the response object
When error is present, a ToolError is thrown with the error code and info message
The error category is mapped appropriately (e.g., badtoken → auth, missingtitle → not_found)
